# Shreyas Y D

> Shreyas Y D is a digital marketing and analytics leader based in Bengaluru, India, with 10+ years of experience. A filmmaker-turned-marketer-turned-systems-builder, he builds content flywheels, marketing measurement systems, and AI-powered growth engines across B2B and B2C — spanning fintech, real estate, logistics, recruitment, technology, media/OTT, and healthcare.

## About

- Name: Shreyas Y D
- Role: Digital Marketing & Analytics Leader · Marketing Technology · AI-Powered Growth Systems
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- Experience: 10+ years (8+ deeply digital)
- Languages: English, Kannada, Hindi
- Open to: Full-time roles (remote or Bengaluru on-site), consulting, and freelance engagements

## Career arc

- The Filmmaker — Diploma in Film Making & Direction (FFVA, Bengaluru); ad films, documentaries, OTT content. The instinct for story, audience, and visual language.
- The Marketer — a decade across content strategy, SEO, social, performance marketing, brand, and analytics. The discipline of measurement.
- The Systems Builder — dashboards, automation, AI workflows, and websites built to outlast any single campaign.

## Verified results

- 17K+ organic LinkedIn community built from zero (Jones RecruitZo) in under a year
- 300% organic lead growth with zero ad spend (Jones Group)
- 87% website visitor growth via AI-powered SEO content pipelines (Jones Elite Logistics)
- 60% reduction in creative turnaround time using AI content systems (Jones Asset Management)
- Unified marketing analytics system across 8 clinic locations integrating 5 Google APIs (GA4, Google Ads, Search Console, Google Business Profile) + GTM tracking
- Brand & communications infrastructure for Chaitanya India (RBI/SEBI-regulated NBFC) — built in 2019, still in active use today

## Core expertise

- Analytics & MarTech: GA4 (incl. API), Google Ads (incl. API), Search Console (incl. API), Google Business Profile API, GTM conversion/call/form tracking, Looker Studio dashboards, SEMrush, Ahrefs, KPI frameworks
- AI & Marketing Technology: prompt engineering, AI content pipelines, human-in-the-loop editorial systems, AEO/GEO content workflows, AI-assisted application development, automated reporting
- Digital Marketing: SEO/AEO/GEO, Google/Meta/LinkedIn Ads, CRO, audience targeting, campaign and budget management
- Content & Brand: content strategy & flywheel design, editorial operations, tone-of-voice, thought leadership, multi-format production, community building
